'''âm-f-d''' ('''mafada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cablecast|cablecast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cablecast|cablecast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-f-d
|-
! Lemma
| mafada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mafadithi|mafadithi]] || [[word:mafadiji|mafadiji]] || [[word:mafadishi|mafadishi]] || [[word:mafadi|mafadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafaduthuth|mafaduthuth]] || [[word:mafadujuj|mafadujuj]] || [[word:mafadushush|mafadushush]] || [[word:mafad|mafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafaduthu|mafaduthu]] || [[word:mafaduju|mafaduju]] || [[word:mafadushu|mafadushu]] || [[word:mafadu|mafadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafadufuth|mafadufuth]] || [[word:mafadufuj|mafadufuj]] || [[word:mafadufush|mafadufush]] || [[word:mafaduf|mafaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mafadethe|mafadethe]] || [[word:mafadeje|mafadeje]] || [[word:mafadeshe|mafadeshe]] || [[word:mafade|mafade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafadothoth|mafadothoth]] || [[word:mafadojoj|mafadojoj]] || [[word:mafadoshosh|mafadoshosh]] || [[word:mafad|mafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafadotho|mafadotho]] || [[word:mafadojo|mafadojo]] || [[word:mafadosho|mafadosho]] || [[word:mafado|mafado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafadofoth|mafadofoth]] || [[word:mafadofoj|mafadofoj]] || [[word:mafadofosh|mafadofosh]] || [[word:mafadof|mafadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mafadĂŠthĂŠ|mafadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mafadĂŠjĂŠ|mafadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mafadĂŠshĂŠ|mafadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mafadĂŠ|mafadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafadathath|mafadathath]] || [[word:mafadajaj|mafadajaj]] || [[word:mafadashash|mafadashash]] || [[word:mafad|mafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafadatha|mafadatha]] || [[word:mafadaja|mafadaja]] || [[word:mafadasha|mafadasha]] || [[word:mafada|mafada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafadafath|mafadafath]] || [[word:mafadafaj|mafadafaj]] || [[word:mafadafash|mafadafash]] || [[word:mafadaf|mafadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mafadasha|mafadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomafadasha|gomafadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimafadasha|gokimafadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafadnĂŒsha|mafadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomafadnknĂŒsha|gomafadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimafadnĂŒsha|gokimafadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafadshĂ«sha|mafadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafadnkshĂ«sha|gomafadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafadshĂ«sha|gokimafadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mafadrosha|mafadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomafadnkrosha|gomafadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimafadrosha|gokimafadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mafadmusha|mafadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafadnkmusha|gomafadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafadmusha|gokimafadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mafadsherasha|mafadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomafadnksherasha|gomafadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimafadsherasha|gokimafadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mafadngasha|mafadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomafadnkngasha|gomafadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimafadngasha|gokimafadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mafadyasha|mafadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomafadnkyasha|gomafadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimafadyasha|gokimafadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mafadyamasha|mafadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomafadnkyamasha|gomafadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimafadyamasha|gokimafadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mafadnĂŒshĂ«sha|mafadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomafadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomafadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimafadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimafadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mafadnĂŒrosha|mafadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomafadnknĂŒrosha|gomafadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimafadnĂŒrosha|gokimafadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafadnĂŒmusha|mafadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafadnknĂŒmusha|gomafadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafadnĂŒmusha|gokimafadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mafadshĂ«nĂŒsha|mafadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomafadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomafadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimafadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimafadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mafadshĂ«rosha|mafadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomafadnkshĂ«rosha|gomafadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimafadshĂ«rosha|gokimafadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafadshĂ«musha|mafadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafadnkshĂ«musha|gomafadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafadshĂ«musha|gokimafadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mafadronĂŒsha|mafadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomafadnkronĂŒsha|gomafadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimafadronĂŒsha|gokimafadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mafadroshĂ«sha|mafadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomafadnkroshĂ«sha|gomafadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimafadroshĂ«sha|gokimafadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafadromusha|mafadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafadnkromusha|gomafadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafadromusha|gokimafadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mafadmunĂŒsha|mafadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomafadnkmunĂŒsha|gomafadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimafadmunĂŒsha|gokimafadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mafadmushĂ«sha|mafadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomafadnkmushĂ«sha|gomafadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimafadmushĂ«sha|gokimafadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mafadmurosha|mafadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomafadnkmurosha|gomafadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimafadmurosha|gokimafadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mafad|mafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠfĂŠd|mĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homafad|homafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠfĂŠd|homĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomafad|hohomafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠfĂŠd|hohomĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmafad|nĂŒmafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠfĂŠd|nĂŒmĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmafad|nĂŒnĂŒmafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠfĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmafad|nĂŻmafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠfĂŠd|nĂŻmĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmafad|nĂŻnĂŻmafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠfĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumafad|lumafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠfĂŠd|lumĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumafad|lulumafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠfĂŠd|lulumĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limafad|limafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠfĂŠd|limĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimafad|lilimafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠfĂŠd|lilimĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komafad|komafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠfĂŠd|komĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomafad|kokomafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠfĂŠd|kokomĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemafad|kemafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠfĂŠd|kemĂŠfĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemafad|kekemafad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠfĂŠd|kekemĂŠfĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
